category_sources: Official homepage https://emacs-eask.github.io/ describes Eask as an Emacs Lisp package development CLI.
source_facts.description says it is a CLI for building, running, testing, and managing Emacs Lisp dependencies.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and branding use "Emacs Eask" and page copy refers to the tool as Eask.
source_facts.name is eask-cli, the package name for the Eask CLI.
docs_sources: Official Eask documentation site at source_facts.homepage.
Official Getting Started pages provide basic usage and command documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository linked from the Eask site and identified as emacs-eask/cli.
tags_sources: Official homepage states Eask supports many commands, linters, and test runners for Elisp package development.
source_facts.description identifies CLI, Emacs Lisp dependencies, building, running, and testing.
